claimText: UNSW penalties for unauthorised AI use in assessments may include a fail grade, a mark of zero for the course, suspension, or permanent exclusion.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: If you have been found to use AI in a manner that does not meet the course instructions, penalties may occur which would include a fail, a mark of zero for the course, suspension or permanent exclusion.

citation.citationTitle: Using AI in university | Current Students – UNSW Sydney
